title: symphyotrichum tenuifolium var. aphyllum
intro: Symphyotrichum tenuifolium var. aphyllum, commonly known as narrowleaf coneflower or mountain coneflower, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
